metadata.name: kestrel
metadata.description: Kestrel — policy-governed CPMM binary BTC markets on MagicBlock Ephemeral Rollups

accounts.name: price_update
docs: `market.oracle_feed` so a bet cannot be placed against a different feed
than the one the market resolves on. Freshness is enforced by

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized signer for this instruction

errors.name: MarketNotOpen
errors.msg: Market is not in Open status

errors.name: MarketClosed
errors.msg: Market is closed or already resolved

errors.name: MarketHalted
errors.msg: Market is halted; only close-position is allowed

errors.name: MarketAlreadySettled
errors.msg: Market has already been settled

errors.name: MarketNotSettled
errors.msg: Market has not been settled yet

errors.name: OutsideMarketWindow
errors.msg: Market window is not open at the current timestamp

errors.name: InvalidMarketWindow
errors.msg: close_ts must be strictly after open_ts and in the future

errors.name: OracleMismatch
errors.msg: Oracle price feed pubkey does not match market.oracle_feed

errors.name: OracleStale
errors.msg: Oracle price update is older than the allowed maximum age

errors.name: OracleDeserialize
errors.msg: Failed to deserialize oracle price update account

errors.name: OverPolicyCap
errors.msg: Bet amount exceeds the agent policy max_stake_per_window

errors.name: TooManyPositions
errors.msg: Agent already holds the maximum number of open positions

errors.name: InsufficientBalance
errors.msg: Agent has insufficient ER-side balance for this bet

errors.name: MarketNotAllowed
errors.msg: Market is not allowed by this agent's policy

errors.name: AgentPaused
errors.msg: Agent is paused

errors.name: WithdrawWhileDelegated
errors.msg: Cannot withdraw while AgentProfile is delegated; commit_and_undelegate_agent first

errors.name: DepositWhileDelegated
errors.msg: Cannot deposit while AgentProfile is delegated

errors.name: PositionNotFound
errors.msg: Position not found for this market on this agent

errors.name: PositionAlreadySettled
errors.msg: Position has already been settled

errors.name: WithdrawExceedsFree
errors.msg: Withdraw amount exceeds free (non-realized) balance

errors.name: SeedLiquidityTooSmall
errors.msg: Seed liquidity below minimum floor

errors.name: InvalidAmount
errors.msg: Bet amount must be > 0

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Math overflow / underflow in CPMM swap or settlement

errors.name: InsufficientShares
errors.msg: Position size mismatch with stored shares

errors.name: Insolvent
errors.msg: Outcome shares would exceed protocol solvency budget

types.name: AgentRegistered
docs: Emitted by `register_agent` after a new AgentProfile PDA has been
initialised. Indexer keys the per-agent feed off this event.

types.name: AgentSettled
docs: is the gross share-to-USDC payout credited to `agent.balance`. Fee is zero
here — the protocol fee is taken at `withdraw` time.

types.name: BetPlaced
docs: Emitted on every successful `place_bet`. Anchor reverts emits on failure,
so this fires only when the bet actually moved reserves; the matching
`PlaceBetAttempted` / `PlaceBetBlocked` rows are synthesised by the indexer

fields.name: btc_usd_price_update
docs: Pyth-style PriceUpdate account pubkey used by open/close for strike/settlement.

fields.name: close_price
docs: Oracle price at close_market time (same scale as strike).

types.name: PolicyUpdated
docs: Emitted by `update_policy` (and any future policy mutation paths). Carries
the full old and new policy so the timeline can render a diff card.
